severity_reason: impossible-speed position jumps

explanation.method: AIS position-anomaly analysis (impossible-speed jumps and same-instant conflicts)
drivers: 3 physically impossible movements for one MMSI
fastest implied speed 378 kn (a vessel cannot move this fast)

caveats: Suspected AIS spoofing or MMSI conflict, not proven and not necessarily illegal.
Could also be a faulty GPS/transceiver or a transcription error in the feed.
Flagged only on a sustained pattern (several anomalies), not a single bad fix.
An inspection lead: confirm the vessel identity against authoritative records.

explanation.method: GFW Events encounters dataset (Miller et al. 2018).
drivers: two vessels within range for 15 h

caveats: Co-location can be legitimate (joint operations, safety, shelter).
Apparent transshipment is inferred from proximity and low speed, not observed.
An inspection lead from GFW Events, not proof of illegal activity.
